RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_FAN_POWER.smar: Lose [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red]. Deal [blue]1[/blue] less damage to KAngel or Needy Girl.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_MONEY_POWER.de: Does not stack or duplicate. This turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red] and [blue]1[/blue] temporary [green]Dexterity[/green].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_MONEY_POWER.sm: Does not stack or duplicate. This turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red] and [blue]1[/blue] temporary [green]Dexterity[/green].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_LOVE_POWER.des: Each stack grants [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red]. Every [blue]2[/blue] stacks also give [blue]-1[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green]. Maximum [blue]4[/blue] stacks.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_LOVE_POWER.sma: Each stack grants [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red]. Every [blue]2[/blue] stacks also give [blue]-1[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green], up to [blue]4[/blue] stacks.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_FENG_SHUI_NODE: At turn start, reroll this to a random value from [blue]1[/blue] to [blue]10[/blue]. If the result is [blue]1[/blue], deal [blue]1[/blue] damage to all creatures and [relic]Persona Derivative: Fortune and Mischance[/relic] gains [blue]1[/blue] stack. If the result is [blue]6[/blue], [relic]Persona Derivative: Fortune and Mischance[/relic] gains [blue]1[/blue] stack.

At turn start, reroll this to [blue]1[/blue]-[blue]10[/blue]. On [blue]1[/blue], deal [blue]1[/blue] damage to all creatures and [relic]Persona Derivative: Fortune and Mischance[/relic] gains [blue]1[/blue] stack. RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_BAI_ZE_BLESSIN: For the rest of this turn, if you would heal while already at full HP, gain that much [power]Half Life Heal[/power] instead. Your Attack cards deal extra damage equal to your current [power]Half Life Heal[/power].
This turn, full-HP healing becomes [power]Half Life Heal[/power], and your Attack cards deal extra damage equal to your current [power]Half Life Heal[/power].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_EYE_FOR_AN_EYE: Each stack triggers once when you successfully gain a debuff with a positive amount, then consumes [blue]1[/blue] stack to reflect that same debuff and amount back to the source.
When you gain a debuff, reflect it to the source and consume [blue]1[/blue] stack.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_WRONG_TARGET_P: Each stack triggers once when you successfully gain a debuff with a positive amount, then consumes [blue]1[/blue] stack to redirect that same debuff and amount to another living enemy other than the source if possible; otherwise reflect it to the source.
When you gain a debuff, redirect it to another enemy or the source, then consume [blue]1[/blue] stack.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_PASSING_BOMB_P: Triggers only at the start of the enemy holder's turn. Roll [blue]1[/blue]-[blue]6[/blue]: on [blue]1[/blue], take [blue]9 + 2^current stacks[/blue] damage; on [blue]2[/blue]-[blue]6[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] stack and pass this to another living enemy. If no other target exists, it only gains a stack.
At the start of the enemy holder's turn, either explode or gain a stack and pass.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_KINGS_POWER_ST: [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turn(s) remaining. At turn start, gain [blue]5[/blue] [red]Strength[/red]. At end of turn, remove the Strength gained from this power for that turn.
[blue]{Amount}[/blue] turn(s) remaining. Gain [blue]5[/blue] Strength each turn, then remove it at end of turn.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_IMMOVABLE_DEXT: [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turn(s) remaining. At turn start, gain [blue]6[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green]. At end of turn, remove the Dexterity gained from this power for that turn.
[blue]{Amount}[/blue] turn(s) remaining. Gain [blue]6[/blue] Dexterity each turn, then remove it at end of turn.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_ART_KNIFE_FULL: While at full HP, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red]. Lose that Strength when you are no longer at full HP.
At full HP, gain temporary [red]Strength[/red]. Lose it when you are no longer at full HP.
While above [blue]80%[/blue] HP, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red]. Lose that Strength when you drop to or below the threshold.
Above [blue]80%[/blue] HP, gain temporary [red]Strength[/red]. Lose it at or below the threshold.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_COIN_BACK_POWE: Displays the total [gold]Tails[/gold] stacks gained this combat.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_JING_RUI_POWER: Your [power]Counter[/power] and [power]Vigil Counter[/power] damage is increased by [blue]5%[/blue] per stack. Maximum [blue]12[/blue] stacks.
[power]Counter[/power] and [power]Vigil Counter[/power] damage is increased by [blue]5%[/blue] per stack. Maximum [blue]12[/blue] stacks.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_CEREMONIAL_BOM: Whenever any player takes damage, consume [blue]1[/blue] stack and trigger [power]Vigil Counter[/power]. Multi-target damage checks each damaged player separately.
When any player takes damage, consume [blue]1[/blue] stack and trigger [power]Vigil Counter[/power].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_VIGIL_COUNTER_: Against the damage source, automatically play the first valid Attack card in your hand from left to right whose cost is at most your remaining Energy + [blue]1[/blue]. If none is available, draw the first valid Attack card in your draw pile that costs [blue]1[/blue] or less, then play it immediately. After it resolves, it leaves your hand normally and goes to the discard pile unless something else redirects it.

Auto-play the first valid Attack in hand whose cost is at most remaining Energy + [blue]1[/blue]; otherwise draw and play the first valid draw-pile Attack that costs [blue]1[/blue] or less, then have it leave your hand normally.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_POWER_ETHERIUM_SWORD: Add [gold]Etherium Greatsword Sweep[/gold] to your hand
